## Verification

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `cd site && pnpm build`

## Documentation

For user-facing command, option, TUI, installer, report, runtime, scanner, or
update changes:

- [ ] `README.md` is updated or not affected
- [ ] `docs/usage.md` is updated or not affected
- [ ] `site/src/main.tsx` is updated or not affected
- [ ] shell completion is updated or not affected

See [docs/documentation.md](../docs/documentation.md).
